query:
ALTER TABLE workforce_agents
  ADD COLUMN crdts VARCHAR(500) NULL AFTER dialerCredentials,
  ADD COLUMN agentStatus ENUM('active','inactive','resigned','terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active' AFTER crdts;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_separations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  agentCode VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('resignation_request','on_spot','termination') NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT,
  lastWorkingDay VARCHAR(10),
  requestedAt BIGINT,
  effectiveAt BIGINT,
  approvedBy VARCHAR(255),
  approvedAt BIGINT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
